name: Carrot Pineapple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165°C). Grease and line two 9x5x3 inch loaf pans with parchment paper.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar and oil with the beaten eggs until well combined.
3. Add the grated carrots and crushed pineapple to the egg mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and vanilla. Mix in the chopped nuts.
5. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until just combined.
6. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
8. Allow the bread to cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pans and lining with parchment paper.
9. Leave the parchment paper on until ready to serve. Cool the bread thoroughly before slicing.
For jars, follow the instructions above.
